description: Log in Find a Property Research Find Agents For Owners News Commercial For sale in Gembrook Home Rural VIC Gembrook 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 Organise an inspection Photos 23 Video Floorplan 1 Virtual Tour Erin Davies First National Real Estate Ranges Enquire 0494 175 · · · $990,000 - $1,089,000 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 3 Beds 1 Bath 8 Parking 1.61ha House View the agent price guide Features Dishwasher Built in wardrobes Fireplace(s) Air-Conditioner Split System Heating Deck Shed Water Tank View less Property Description 'Khandala', Four acres of Tranquility, your Search is Over. Escape to the peace and charm of country living with this beautifully maintained lifestyle property set on approximately 4 acres of picturesque flat land. Privately positioned behind an enchanting oak-lined driveway, this inviting residence offers a rare combination of space, warmth, and timeless character, all surrounded by stunning established gardens and a large dam. "Khandala" welcomes you with a warm and cosy ambience, featuring 3 bedrooms, the main with fireplace, also open plan living and a thoughtfully designed interior that has been impeccably cared for inside and out. At the heart of the home is the bespoke 'Smith & Smith' kitchen, complete with timber benchtops, a contemporary oven, dishwasher and a beautifully restored vintage-style wood oven, now converted to an electric stove top blending country charm with modern convenience. Comfort is assured year-round with split system heating and cooling, as well as a wood heater for those cooler months. The luxurious bathroom adds a touch of indulgence with a floating vanity, deep soaking tub, and separate shower. Outside, the property continues to impress with exceptional infrastructure for vehicles, storage, and hobbies, including a double carport, double garage, and a substantial barn-style garage with room for up to 3 additional vehicles plus workshop space. There is also a veggie patch and abundant open space to enjoy the relaxed country lifestyle. The magnificent gardens are a true highlight, lovingly established over the years and highlighting an array of botanical trees and shrubs that provide beauty and colour throughout every season. Adding further appeal is the 3KW solar power system helping to keep energy costs low, while the location offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience just a short drive to both Pakenham and Gembrook, with local shops, cafés, eateries, and the primary school all within easy reach. Tucked away from the road and surrounded by nature, this is the country escape you have been dreaming of. Call Erin Davies 0494 175 410 or Mick Dolphin 0429 684 522 to arrange an inspection. description: Log in Find a Property Research Find Agents For Owners News Commercial For sale in Gembrook Home Rural VIC Gembrook 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 Organise an inspection Photos 23 Video Floorplan 1 Virtual Tour Erin Davies First National Real Estate Ranges Enquire 0494 175 · · · $990,000 - $1,089,000 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 3 Beds 1 Bath 8 Parking 1.61ha House View the agent price guide Features Dishwasher Built in wardrobes Fireplace(s) Air-Conditioner Split System Heating Deck Shed Water Tank View less Property Description 'Khandala', Four acres of Tranquility, your Search is Over. Escape to the peace and charm of country living with this beautifully maintained lifestyle property set on approximately 4 acres of picturesque flat land. Privately positioned behind an enchanting oak-lined driveway, this inviting residence offers a rare combination of space, warmth, and timeless character, all surrounded by stunning established gardens and a large dam. "Khandala" welcomes you with a warm and cosy ambience, featuring 3 bedrooms, the main with fireplace, also open plan living and a thoughtfully designed interior that has been impeccably cared for inside and out. At the heart of the home is the bespoke 'Smith & Smith' kitchen, complete with timber benchtops, a contemporary oven, dishwasher and a beautifully restored vintage-style wood oven, now converted to an electric stove top blending country charm with modern convenience. Comfort is assured year-round with split system heating and cooling, as well as a wood heater for those cooler months. The luxurious bathroom adds a touch of indulgence with a floating vanity, deep soaking tub, and separate shower. Outside, the property continues to impress with exceptional infrastructure for vehicles, storage, and hobbies, including a double carport, double garage, and a substantial barn-style garage with room for up to 3 additional vehicles plus workshop space. There is also a veggie patch and abundant open space to enjoy the relaxed country lifestyle. The magnificent gardens are a true highlight, lovingly established over the years and highlighting an array of botanical trees and shrubs that provide beauty and colour throughout every season. Adding further appeal is the 3KW solar power system helping to keep energy costs low, while the location offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience just a short drive to both Pakenham and Gembrook, with local shops, cafés, eateries, and the primary school all within easy reach. Tucked away from the road and surrounded by nature, this is the country escape you have been dreaming of. Call Erin Davies 0494 175 410 or Mick Dolphin 0429 684 522 to arrange an inspection. description: Log in Find a Property Research Find Agents For Owners News Commercial For sale in Gembrook Home Rural VIC Gembrook 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 Organise an inspection Photos 23 Video Floorplan 1 Virtual Tour Erin Davies First National Real Estate Ranges Enquire 0494 175 · · · $990,000 - $1,089,000 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 3 Beds 1 Bath 8 Parking 1.61ha House View the agent price guide Features Dishwasher Built in wardrobes Fireplace(s) Air-Conditioner Split System Heating Deck Shed Water Tank View less Property Description 'Khandala', Four acres of Tranquility, your Search is Over. Escape to the peace and charm of country living with this beautifully maintained lifestyle property set on approximately 4 acres of picturesque flat land. Privately positioned behind an enchanting oak-lined driveway, this inviting residence offers a rare combination of space, warmth, and timeless character, all surrounded by stunning established gardens and a large dam. "Khandala" welcomes you with a warm and cosy ambience, featuring 3 bedrooms, the main with fireplace, also open plan living and a thoughtfully designed interior that has been impeccably cared for inside and out. At the heart of the home is the bespoke 'Smith & Smith' kitchen, complete with timber benchtops, a contemporary oven, dishwasher and a beautifully restored vintage-style wood oven, now converted to an electric stove top blending country charm with modern convenience. Comfort is assured year-round with split system heating and cooling, as well as a wood heater for those cooler months. The luxurious bathroom adds a touch of indulgence with a floating vanity, deep soaking tub, and separate shower. Outside, the property continues to impress with exceptional infrastructure for vehicles, storage, and hobbies, including a double carport, double garage, and a substantial barn-style garage with room for up to 3 additional vehicles plus workshop space. There is also a veggie patch and abundant open space to enjoy the relaxed country lifestyle. The magnificent gardens are a true highlight, lovingly established over the years and highlighting an array of botanical trees and shrubs that provide beauty and colour throughout every season. Adding further appeal is the 3KW solar power system helping to keep energy costs low, while the location offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience just a short drive to both Pakenham and Gembrook, with local shops, cafés, eateries, and the primary school all within easy reach. Tucked away from the road and surrounded by nature, this is the country escape you have been dreaming of. Call Erin Davies 0494 175 410 or Mick Dolphin 0429 684 522 to arrange an inspection. description: Log in Find a Property Research Find Agents For Owners News Commercial For sale in Gembrook Home Rural VIC Gembrook 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 Organise an inspection Photos 23 Video Floorplan 1 Virtual Tour Mick Dolphin First National Real Estate Ranges Enquire 0429 684 · · · $990,000 - $1,089,000 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 3 Beds 1 Bath 8 Parking 1.61ha House View the agent price guide Features Dishwasher Built in wardrobes Fireplace(s) Air-Conditioner Split System Heating Deck Shed Water Tank View less Property Description 'Khandala', Four acres of Tranquility, your Search is Over. Escape to the peace and charm of country living with this beautifully maintained lifestyle property set on approximately 4 acres of picturesque flat land. Privately positioned behind an enchanting oak-lined driveway, this inviting residence offers a rare combination of space, warmth, and timeless character, all surrounded by stunning established gardens and a large dam. "Khandala" welcomes you with a warm and cosy ambience, featuring 3 bedrooms, the main with fireplace, also open plan living and a thoughtfully designed interior that has been impeccably cared for inside and out. At the heart of the home is the bespoke 'Smith & Smith' kitchen, complete with timber benchtops, a contemporary oven, dishwasher and a beautifully restored vintage-style wood oven, now converted to an electric stove top blending country charm with modern convenience. Comfort is assured year-round with split system heating and cooling, as well as a wood heater for those cooler months. The luxurious bathroom adds a touch of indulgence with a floating vanity, deep soaking tub, and separate shower. Outside, the property continues to impress with exceptional infrastructure for vehicles, storage, and hobbies, including a double carport, double garage, and a substantial barn-style garage with room for up to 3 additional vehicles plus workshop space. There is also a veggie patch and abundant open space to enjoy the relaxed country lifestyle. The magnificent gardens are a true highlight, lovingly established over the years and highlighting an array of botanical trees and shrubs that provide beauty and colour throughout every season. Adding further appeal is the 3KW solar power system helping to keep energy costs low, while the location offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience just a short drive to both Pakenham and Gembrook, with local shops, cafés, eateries, and the primary school all within easy reach. Tucked away from the road and surrounded by nature, this is the country escape you have been dreaming of. Call Erin Davies 0494 175 410 or Mick Dolphin 0429 684 522 to arrange an inspection. description: Log in Find a Property Research Find Agents For Owners News Commercial For sale in Gembrook Home Rural VIC Gembrook 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 Organise an inspection Photos 23 Video Floorplan 1 Virtual Tour Mick Dolphin First National Real Estate Ranges Enquire 0429 684 · · · $990,000 - $1,089,000 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 3 Beds 1 Bath 8 Parking 1.61ha House View the agent price guide Features Dishwasher Built in wardrobes Fireplace(s) Air-Conditioner Split System Heating Deck Shed Water Tank View less Property Description 'Khandala', Four acres of Tranquility, your Search is Over. Escape to the peace and charm of country living with this beautifully maintained lifestyle property set on approximately 4 acres of picturesque flat land. Privately positioned behind an enchanting oak-lined driveway, this inviting residence offers a rare combination of space, warmth, and timeless character, all surrounded by stunning established gardens and a large dam. "Khandala" welcomes you with a warm and cosy ambience, featuring 3 bedrooms, the main with fireplace, also open plan living and a thoughtfully designed interior that has been impeccably cared for inside and out. At the heart of the home is the bespoke 'Smith & Smith' kitchen, complete with timber benchtops, a contemporary oven, dishwasher and a beautifully restored vintage-style wood oven, now converted to an electric stove top blending country charm with modern convenience. Comfort is assured year-round with split system heating and cooling, as well as a wood heater for those cooler months. The luxurious bathroom adds a touch of indulgence with a floating vanity, deep soaking tub, and separate shower. Outside, the property continues to impress with exceptional infrastructure for vehicles, storage, and hobbies, including a double carport, double garage, and a substantial barn-style garage with room for up to 3 additional vehicles plus workshop space. There is also a veggie patch and abundant open space to enjoy the relaxed country lifestyle. The magnificent gardens are a true highlight, lovingly established over the years and highlighting an array of botanical trees and shrubs that provide beauty and colour throughout every season. Adding further appeal is the 3KW solar power system helping to keep energy costs low, while the location offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience just a short drive to both Pakenham and Gembrook, with local shops, cafés, eateries, and the primary school all within easy reach. Tucked away from the road and surrounded by nature, this is the country escape you have been dreaming of. Call Erin Davies 0494 175 410 or Mick Dolphin 0429 684 522 to arrange an inspection. description: Log in Find a Property Research Find Agents For Owners News Commercial For sale in Gembrook Home Rural VIC Gembrook 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 Organise an inspection Photos 23 Video Floorplan 1 Virtual Tour Mick Dolphin First National Real Estate Ranges Enquire 0429 684 · · · $990,000 - $1,089,000 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 3 Beds 1 Bath 8 Parking 1.61ha House View the agent price guide Features Dishwasher Built in wardrobes Fireplace(s) Air-Conditioner Split System Heating Deck Shed Water Tank View less Property Description 'Khandala', Four acres of Tranquility, your Search is Over. Escape to the peace and charm of country living with this beautifully maintained lifestyle property set on approximately 4 acres of picturesque flat land. Privately positioned behind an enchanting oak-lined driveway, this inviting residence offers a rare combination of space, warmth, and timeless character, all surrounded by stunning established gardens and a large dam. "Khandala" welcomes you with a warm and cosy ambience, featuring 3 bedrooms, the main with fireplace, also open plan living and a thoughtfully designed interior that has been impeccably cared for inside and out. At the heart of the home is the bespoke 'Smith & Smith' kitchen, complete with timber benchtops, a contemporary oven, dishwasher and a beautifully restored vintage-style wood oven, now converted to an electric stove top blending country charm with modern convenience. Comfort is assured year-round with split system heating and cooling, as well as a wood heater for those cooler months. The luxurious bathroom adds a touch of indulgence with a floating vanity, deep soaking tub, and separate shower. Outside, the property continues to impress with exceptional infrastructure for vehicles, storage, and hobbies, including a double carport, double garage, and a substantial barn-style garage with room for up to 3 additional vehicles plus workshop space. There is also a veggie patch and abundant open space to enjoy the relaxed country lifestyle. The magnificent gardens are a true highlight, lovingly established over the years and highlighting an array of botanical trees and shrubs that provide beauty and colour throughout every season. Adding further appeal is the 3KW solar power system helping to keep energy costs low, while the location offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience just a short drive to both Pakenham and Gembrook, with local shops, cafés, eateries, and the primary school all within easy reach. Tucked away from the road and surrounded by nature, this is the country escape you have been dreaming of. Call Erin Davies 0494 175 410 or Mick Dolphin 0429 684 522 to arrange an inspection. description: Log in Find a Property Research Find Agents For Owners News Commercial For sale in Gembrook Home Rural VIC Gembrook 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 Organise an inspection Photos 23 Video Floorplan 1 Virtual Tour Mick Dolphin First National Real Estate Ranges Enquire 0429 684 · · · $990,000 - $1,089,000 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 3 Beds 1 Bath 8 Parking 1.61ha House View the agent price guide Features Dishwasher Built in wardrobes Fireplace(s) Air-Conditioner Split System Heating Deck Shed Water Tank View less Property Description 'Khandala', Four acres of Tranquility, your Search is Over. Escape to the peace and charm of country living with this beautifully maintained lifestyle property set on approximately 4 acres of picturesque flat land. Privately positioned behind an enchanting oak-lined driveway, this inviting residence offers a rare combination of space, warmth, and timeless character, all surrounded by stunning established gardens and a large dam. "Khandala" welcomes you with a warm and cosy ambience, featuring 3 bedrooms, the main with fireplace, also open plan living and a thoughtfully designed interior that has been impeccably cared for inside and out. At the heart of the home is the bespoke 'Smith & Smith' kitchen, complete with timber benchtops, a contemporary oven, dishwasher and a beautifully restored vintage-style wood oven, now converted to an electric stove top blending country charm with modern convenience. Comfort is assured year-round with split system heating and cooling, as well as a wood heater for those cooler months. The luxurious bathroom adds a touch of indulgence with a floating vanity, deep soaking tub, and separate shower. Outside, the property continues to impress with exceptional infrastructure for vehicles, storage, and hobbies, including a double carport, double garage, and a substantial barn-style garage with room for up to 3 additional vehicles plus workshop space. There is also a veggie patch and abundant open space to enjoy the relaxed country lifestyle. The magnificent gardens are a true highlight, lovingly established over the years and highlighting an array of botanical trees and shrubs that provide beauty and colour throughout every season. Adding further appeal is the 3KW solar power system helping to keep energy costs low, while the location offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience just a short drive to both Pakenham and Gembrook, with local shops, cafés, eateries, and the primary school all within easy reach. Tucked away from the road and surrounded by nature, this is the country escape you have been dreaming of. Call Erin Davies 0494 175 410 or Mick Dolphin 0429 684 522 to arrange an inspection. description: Log in Find a Property Research Find Agents For Owners News Commercial For sale in Gembrook Home Rural VIC Gembrook 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 Organise an inspection Photos 23 Video Floorplan 1 Virtual Tour Erin Davies First National Real Estate Ranges Enquire 0494 175 · · · $990,000 - $1,089,000 655 Gembrook-Tonimbuk Road, Gembrook VIC 3783 3 Beds 1 Bath 8 Parking 1.61ha House View the agent price guide Features Dishwasher Built in wardrobes Fireplace(s) Air-Conditioner Split System Heating Deck Shed Water Tank View less Property Description 'Khandala', Four acres of Tranquility, your Search is Over. Escape to the peace and charm of country living with this beautifully maintained lifestyle property set on approximately 4 acres of picturesque flat land. Privately positioned behind an enchanting oak-lined driveway, this inviting residence offers a rare combination of space, warmth, and timeless character, all surrounded by stunning established gardens and a large dam. "Khandala" welcomes you with a warm and cosy ambience, featuring 3 bedrooms, the main with fireplace, also open plan living and a thoughtfully designed interior that has been impeccably cared for inside and out. At the heart of the home is the bespoke 'Smith & Smith' kitchen, complete with timber benchtops, a contemporary oven, dishwasher and a beautifully restored vintage-style wood oven, now converted to an electric stove top blending country charm with modern convenience. Comfort is assured year-round with split system heating and cooling, as well as a wood heater for those cooler months. The luxurious bathroom adds a touch of indulgence with a floating vanity, deep soaking tub, and separate shower. Outside, the property continues to impress with exceptional infrastructure for vehicles, storage, and hobbies, including a double carport, double garage, and a substantial barn-style garage with room for up to 3 additional vehicles plus workshop space. There is also a veggie patch and abundant open space to enjoy the relaxed country lifestyle. The magnificent gardens are a true highlight, lovingly established over the years and highlighting an array of botanical trees and shrubs that provide beauty and colour throughout every season. Adding further appeal is the 3KW solar power system helping to keep energy costs low, while the location offers the perfect balance of privacy and convenience just a short drive to both Pakenham and Gembrook, with local shops, cafés, eateries, and the primary school all within easy reach. Tucked away from the road and surrounded by nature, this is the country escape you have been dreaming of. Call Erin Davies 0494 175 410 or Mick Dolphin 0429 684 522 to arrange an inspection.
